headline: AEP Names Maryam S. Brown President and COO of Indiana Michigan Power
summary: American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has named Maryam S. Brown president and chief operating officer of Indiana Michigan Power (I&M), effective April 27. Brown will report to Bill Fehrman, AEP chairman, president and chief executive officer.

headline: April 2026 TSX Penny Stocks To Watch
summary: As the Canadian market navigates a backdrop of rising inflation and fluctuating oil prices, the S&P/TSX index has shown resilience with a notable recovery from its mid-March lows. In such times, investors might find potential in penny stocks, which often represent smaller or newer companies. Despite being considered an outdated term by some, these stocks continue to offer intriguing opportunities for those looking beyond traditional investment avenues.

headline: American Electric Power’s Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: American Electric Power is ready to report its fiscal first-quarter earnings soon, and analysts project a single-digit profit boost.
